title: Fix admin login with passcode sastra2026 and resolve canister stopped error

requirements.text: Update the admin passcode in the backend to 'sastra2026'. The hardcoded admin passcode used in the adminLogin function must be changed to 'sastra2026' so that login succeeds with that value.
acceptanceCriteria: Entering 'sastra2026' on the Admin Login page returns a successful session token and redirects to the admin dashboard
Entering any other passcode returns an authentication error

requirements.text: Ensure the backend actor initializes and starts correctly on deployment so it does not enter a stopped state (IC0508). The actor must be self-contained, have no blocking pre-upgrade hooks that prevent startup, and handle upgrade gracefully to avoid the canister being left in a stopped state.
acceptanceCriteria: After deployment, calling adminLogin from the frontend does not return IC0508 or 'canister is stopped' errors
The admin login page successfully authenticates with passcode 'sastra2026' without any replica rejection errors

requirements.text: On the Admin Login page, when a backend/canister error occurs (such as IC0508 or replica rejection), display a user-friendly error message such as 'Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again.' instead of the raw rejection error text.

quotes: The replica returned a rejection error
Canister idkn6-jqaaa-aaaad-qiq3a-cai is stopped Error code: IC0508

acceptanceCriteria: When the backend returns a canister-stopped or replica rejection error, the login page shows a clean, readable error message instead of the raw JSON/error blob
The error message does not expose internal canister IDs or request IDs to the user

constraints: Admin passcode must be set to exactly 'sastra2026'
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Changing any other authentication mechanism or team login flow
Modifying the auction, player, or team management logic beyond what is needed for this fix
